mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forms (user_id, slug, title, description, status, response_limit) VALUES (#{userId}, #{slug}, #{title}, #{description}, #{status}, #{responseLimit})
mapper.select: SELECT id, user_id, slug, title, description, status, response_limit, closed_at, closes_at, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM forms WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT id, user_id, slug, title, description, status, response_limit, closed_at, closes_at, deleted_at, created_at, updated_at FROM forms WHERE slug = #{slug} AND status = 'PUBLISHED' AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM forms WHERE slug = #{slug})

SELECT f.id AS id, f.slug AS slug, f.title AS title, f.status AS status, f.response_limit AS response_limit, f.created_at AS created_at, COUNT(r.id) AS response_count FROM forms f LEFT JOIN responses r ON r.form_id = f.id WHERE f.user_id = #{userId} AND f.deleted_at IS NULL GROUP BY f.id, f.slug, f.title, f.status, f.response_limit, f.created_at ORDER BY f.created_at DESC, f.id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forms WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forms WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE forms SET status = #{status}, closed_at = #{closedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forms SET closes_at = #{closesAt} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id FROM forms WHERE status = 'PUBLISHED' AND closes_at IS NOT NULL AND closes_at <= #{now} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE forms SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forms SET deleted_at = #{deletedAt} WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM forms f JOIN users u ON u.id = f.user_id WHERE f.deleted_at IS NULL
AND (f.slug LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR f.title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR u.email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
